description: Recto: Account in Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals, with some Arabic script. Names: Mufaḍḍal; Abū l-Thanāʾ; the children of Ibrāhīm; Abū Saʿīd; Makārim; Sulaymān; the children of Barakāt; the household of Mūsā. The scribe uses three dots for the letter thā. On verso there are pen trials, possibly of the "glyph."
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
